content: InTheWake fetcher --skip-substr pattern: repeatable flag to bypass Commons files whose non-ASCII names cause commonsapi.php to 500 and the cors-anywhere.fly.dev fallback to stall for 5+ minutes. Skip-substr matches Commons title (case-insensitive). Common skips: non-ASCII names, files matching known-bad patterns like 'Ships_at_Sea', 'Cruise_ships_off', multi-ship panorama titles.
